title: BSNC Extends CARES Act Direct Assistance Deadline
summary: BSNC has extended the deadline for shareholders to apply for CARES Act Direct Assistance to Dec. 10, 2021. There is enough CARES Act Direct Assistance funding for each shareholder to receive up to $2,000 for costs incurred by the COVID-19 pandemic. Unused funds must be returned to the U.S. Treasury,...
